modules.description: Core pipeline agents: Paige (lead), Artie (architect), Una (UX), Sam (security), Beck (backend), Effie (frontend), Quinn (QA)
Code reviewer: Stan Standards (logic + performance + language-specific quality, read-only)
Ship agent: Devon Ops (docs + changelog + release + announcement, ultimate trump card)
Utility agent: Heracles (debugger, root cause analysis, on-demand)
General engineering skills — useful standalone, outside the pipeline
Java / Spring Boot skills — coding standards, patterns, TDD, security, source intel (semantic queries via text-based tools: ripgrep + find + tree)
Pipeline artifact writers — define format/schema for review artifacts (SDD, CODE-REVIEW, REVIEW, UX-SPEC)
Specialized skills: task breakdown, project discovery, post-deploy analytics, QA planning, templates, entropy reduction, requirements clarity, run profiling

SuperClaude knowledge-skills inlined from SuperClaude_Plugin v4.3.0 (MIT). Named-methodology skills only: spec-panel (10 expert personas), brainstorm (Socratic), pm (orchestration), research (adaptive), estimate (structured frames). Verb-wrappers (analyze/build/design/document/implement/improve/test/troubleshoot) removed in v2.0.0 — agents handle those inline. Ships with ohmyclaude — no external dependency.
Common coding style rules — apply to all languages
Java rules — coding style, patterns, security, testing (path-activated on **/*.java)
TypeScript rules — coding style, patterns, security, testing (path-activated on **/*.ts and **/*.tsx)
Single entry point: /forge (route, sprint, release, commit, help)

Plugin-owned MCP servers declared in `.mcp.json`. Currently: `ohmyclaude-fs` (filesystem helpers — exposes `tree` as a named, trackable MCP tool so it appears distinctly in dashboard tool_mix instead of being lost under Bash). Stdlib-only Node — no external dependencies. Approval prompt appears on first install.
Quality hooks: block writes with secrets (PreToolUse), run linter after bash (PostToolUse)
Tracking hooks: backlog index rebuild, session summary, team cleanup
Cost-profiler hook: on SubagentStop/Stop, writes .claude/pipeline/PROFILE-<runId>.md and rolling baseline.json (measures /forge runs, pairs with skills/profile-run)

Per-project usage telemetry (v2.3+): on SessionStart/UserPromptSubmit/PreToolUse/Stop, appends metadata events to <cwd>/.claude/usage/events.jsonl (prompt bodies never logged). Pairs with scripts/usage-report.js for insight rollups. Set OHMYCLAUDE_USAGE_TRACKING=off to disable.

Session intelligence hooks (v2.2.0): SessionStart hints at saved sessions via /load; PreCompact snapshots pipeline artifacts to the active session's stages.json; SubagentStart appends telemetry to traces.jsonl. Works with /save and /load skills. Opt-in (not in defaultInstall) — session state is a per-user preference, not a default.
Session lifecycle skills (v2.2.0): /save captures session state to ~/.claude/ohmyclaude/sessions/, /load reads and resumes it. Pairs with hooks-session. Host-local only — no repo writes.
User-invocable /save and /load commands for session lifecycle. Thin wrappers — real logic lives in skills-session.
